name: Alberto Castillo
transactions: April 15, 1987:Signed by theNew York Metsas an amateur free agent.

December 14, 1998:Drafted by theSt. Louis Cardinalsfrom thePhiladelphia Philliesin the 1998 rule 5 draft.
November 11, 1999:Traded by theSt. Louis CardinalswithMatt DeWittandLance Painterto theToronto Blue JaysforPat HentgenandPaul Spoljaric.
December 12, 2001:Released by theToronto Blue Jays.
December 21, 2001:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
October 10, 2002:Released by theNew York Yankees.

November 6, 2003:Signed as a Free Agent with theSan Francisco Giants.
March 17, 2004:Released by theSan Francisco Giants.
March 22, 2004:Signed as a Free Agent with theKansas City Royals.

October 21, 2004:Signed as a Free Agent with theKansas City Royals.
August 5, 2005:Released by theKansas City Royals.

December 13, 2005:Signed as a Free Agent with theWashington Nationals.
October 15, 2006:Granted Free Agency.
November 24, 2006:Signed as a Free Agent with theBoston Red Sox.
